message:
docs(ft-xbnl0.2.4): Mutex/RwLock cancel-semantics notes (tick 444)

Completes primitive-wrapper cancel-semantics doc coverage by
annotating the three remaining cx-first surfaces in runtime_compat
that are NOT tested in the Run 6 primitive contract suite because
they have a different contract — panic-on-cancel rather than
Err-on-cancel:

- `Mutex::lock_with_cx` (lines 231-238)
- `RwLock::read_with_cx` (lines 304-316)
- `RwLock::write_with_cx` (lines 330-341)

Each of these uses `.expect()` on the inner asupersync acquire result,
preserving an infallible return-type contract for callers originally
written against `Mutex::lock()` / `RwLock::{read,write}()`. The
trade-off is that cancel surfaces as a panic rather than a clean
`Err` variant — distinct from the 6 asupersync-backed recv/acquire
primitives pinned by ticks 418-439.

The new "Cancellation semantics" sections explicitly call out:
- panic-on-cancel contract (vs Err-on-cancel for recv/acquire)
- rationale (infallible-contract preservation)
- alternative: use recv/acquire primitives if clean Err is needed
- §2.6.1 reference for the broader surface map

Mutex has the full rationale; RwLock::read/write refer back to the
Mutex section to avoid duplication.

All runtime_compat cx-first primitive surfaces with cancel-semantics
notes now:

| Surface                            | Tick added | Contract        |
|------------------------------------|-----------|-----------------|
| sleep_with_cx                      | 331       | budget-observe  |
| timeout_with_cx                    | 328       | budget-observe  |
| broadcast_recv_with_cx             | 436       | pre-cancel-Err  |
| oneshot_recv_with_cx               | 436       | pre-cancel-Err  |
| mpsc module                        | 436       | pre-cancel-Err  |
| watch module                       | 437       | pre-cancel-Err  |
| Semaphore::acquire_with_cx         | 441       | pre-cancel-Err  |
| Semaphore::acquire_owned_with_cx   | 441       | pre-cancel-Err  |
| JoinSet::join_next_with_cx         | 441       | pre+mid-cancel  |
| Mutex::lock_with_cx                | **444**   | panic-on-cancel |
| RwLock::read_with_cx               | **444**   | panic-on-cancel |
| RwLock::write_with_cx              | **444**   | panic-on-cancel |

12 surfaces total. No code behavior change — doc additions only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
